userdoc.notice: Library for interacting with the forge artifacts.

documentation.text:
@notice Removes the semantic versioning from a contract name. The semver will exist if the contract is compiled
 more than once with different versions of the compiler.

@notice Builds the fully qualified name of a contract. Assumes that the
         file name is the same as the contract name but strips semver for the file name.
@notice Returns the storage layout for a deployed contract.
@notice Returns the abi from a the forge artifact

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory,string memory) pure returns (string memory[] memory)

documentation.text: @notice Returns the methodIdentifiers from the forge artifact

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory,string memory) pure returns (string memory[] memory)

documentation.text:
@notice Returns the filesystem path to the artifact path. If the contract was compiled
         with multiple solidity versions then return the first one based on the result of `ls`.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory) view external returns (string memory)

documentation.text: @notice Returns the forge artifact given a contract name.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory) pure external returns (bytes memory)

documentation.text: @notice Pulls the `_initialized` storage slot information from the Forge artifacts for a given contract.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory) pure external returns (bytes memory)

documentation.text: @notice Returns the storage slot for a given contract and slot name

@notice Returns whether or not a contract is initialized.
         Needs the name to get the storage layout.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory) pure external returns (bytes memory)
function (string memory,string memory[] memory) returns (string memory[] memory)
function (uint256) pure returns (struct Abi memory[] memory)
function (uint256) pure returns (struct AbiEntry memory[] memory)

documentation.text: @notice Returns the function ABIs of all L1 contracts.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory,string memory) pure external returns (string memory[] memory)

documentation.text:
@notice Accepts a filepath and then ensures that the directory
         exists for the file to live in.

@title ForgeArtifacts
 @notice Library for interacting with the forge artifacts.
